name: markdown-loom
description: Plain-markdown note taking with wikilinks, backlinks, and tasks.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint

viewsWelcome.contents: Open a markdown file to see notes that link to it.

markdownLoom.wikiLinkStyle.markdownDescription: Reserved for future use. `[[` completion always inserts the note basename. Path-style insertion (`relative`, `absolute`) was removed when wikilink targets were restricted to bare names; see `docs/SPEC.md` 'Wikilink target syntax'.

markdownLoom.taskDateFormat.markdownDescription: Reserved for future use. Task dates are always written in ISO 8601 (`YYYY-MM-DD`) per `docs/SPEC.md` to keep notes interoperable with Obsidian Tasks; alternative formats are not currently honored.

markdownLoom.queryLimitDefault.description: Default maximum number of tasks returned by a `tasks` query block (Phase 2).

markdownLoom.autoAddDoneDate.description: Automatically append a done date (✅ YYYY-MM-DD) when toggling a task to done.

markdownLoom.indexStatusSampleSize.description: Number of indexed note paths shown as a sample in the 'Show Index Status' command output.

enumDescriptions: Ask for confirmation before creating the missing note (current behavior).
Create the missing note silently and open it.
Do nothing; leave the missing target missing (no toast, no file).
markdownLoom.createMissingNoteOnClick.markdownDescription: Behavior when clicking a `[[wikilink]]` to a missing note. Only applies to `.md` targets; non-`.md` (attachment) wikilinks are never auto-created.

enumDescriptions: Write the new file at the workspace folder root of the source note (current behavior).
Write the new file next to the file containing the clicked wikilink. Falls back to the workspace folder root when the source isn't a file on disk (e.g., an untitled buffer).
Write the new file inside the workspace-relative directory configured by `markdownLoom.newFileCustomPath`. Intermediate folders are created as needed.
markdownLoom.newFileLocation.markdownDescription: Where click-to-create writes a new file for a missing `[[wikilink]]`. In a multi-root workspace the destination is resolved against the workspace folder of the source note (the file containing the clicked link).

markdownLoom.newFileCustomPath.markdownDescription: Workspace-relative directory used when `#markdownLoom.newFileLocation#` is `customPath`. Resolved against the source note's workspace folder; absolute paths or paths that escape the workspace folder fall back to the workspace folder root.

markdownLoom.attachmentExtensions.markdownDescription: File extensions (without leading dot) that are indexed for non-`.md` wikilink resolution. A `[[Name.pdf]]` wikilink resolves to any file named `Name.pdf` in the workspace. Changing this setting triggers an index rebuild.
